message:
fix(reliability): address state, type safety, and accessibility issues

- userPreferences.ts: Only update React state if storage operation
  succeeds to prevent state/storage inconsistency
- lesson-content.tsx: Add useMemo to derived values (isCompleted,
  prevLesson, nextLesson, isWizardComplete) to prevent unnecessary
  recalculations on every render
- track/route.ts: Add 'value' property check before accessing it
  in sanitizeUserProperties for proper type narrowing
- analytics.ts: Log sendServerEvent errors in development for better
  debugging visibility while still silently failing in production
- confetti-celebration.tsx: Add body scroll lock and auto-focus to
  primary button when celebration modal opens for better accessibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
